title: Section 26
content: (1) All proceedings pending in the High Court of Assam, Nagaland, Meghalaya, Manipur, Tripura and Mizoram immediately before the appointed day shall, from such day, stand transferred to the common High Court. (2) Every proceeding transferred under sub-section (1) shall be disposed of by the common High Court as if such proceeding was entertained by that High Court.
